liveProviderSmoke.evidence: Paste provider smoke command output or CI artifact URL.

providerWebhookApproval.evidence: Firestore path showing approved privateVerification and public summary update.

providerWebhookRejection.evidence: Firestore path showing rejected request without public badge.

providerWebhookIdempotency.evidence: Repeated webhook result showing no duplicate approval/audit side effects.

adminReviewerE2E.evidence: Reviewer flow notes: pending -> needs info/reject/approve/revoke -> audit log.

broadSurfaceQA.evidence: Screens checked: profile header, org header, member cards, creator cards, DM sheet, contextual comments.

remoteConfigRollout.evidence: Remote Config version and rollback test notes.

dataBackfill.evidence: Dry-run and write output from backfill-verification-summaries.mjs.

accessibilityDeviceQA.evidence: Device/settings matrix notes for VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, contrast, transparency, motion, dark mode.

noRawIdStorageConfirmed.evidence: Firestore inspection confirming no raw ID/selfie/document fields.

clientSpoofingBlockedConfirmed.evidence: Rules/backend test artifacts proving clients cannot write truth fields.
